title: rubus bibractensis
intro: Rubus bibractensis, also known as Himalayan raspberry, is a plant species in the rose family that is native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus bibractensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
